hooks.command: input=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^rm\s+-rf\s+(/|~|\.)' || echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+--force.*(main|master)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: destructive rm -rf or force-push to main. Use a safer alternative."}'; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo '=== PRE-PUSH VERIFICATION ===' && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 && echo 'All tests pass — push allowed.' || { echo 'BLOCKED: Tests failing. Fix before pushing.'; exit 1; }
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'SPEC.md'; then echo 'SPEC MODIFIED — run: python3 scripts/check_spec_quality.py '"$FILE"; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'src/'; then echo 'CODE MODIFIED — verify: Arabic text safe? Metadata preserved (D-023)?'; fi

( FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" add "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Modified: $FILE" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/changes.log"; fi ) &>/dev/null & exit 0

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo '=== POST-COMPACTION RECOVERY ===' && echo '' && echo '--- NEXT.md (current task) ---' && head -15 NEXT.md 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '--- Active engine state ---' && for d in engines/*/CLAUDE.md; do if head -30 "$d" 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'IN PROGRESS'; then echo "ACTIVE: $d" && head -25 "$d" 2>/dev/null | grep -E '(Session|COMPLETE|IN PROGRESS|NEXT)'; fi; done && echo '' && echo '--- INVARIANTS (non-negotiable) ---' && echo '(1) Library IS the users knowledge — errors propagate into his mind' && echo '(2) Accuracy > Protection > Intelligence (D-006)' && echo '(3) Metadata never deleted, only enriched (D-023)' && echo '(4) Errors fail loud — never silent default (D-033)' && echo '(5) Multi-model consensus for ALL content decisions (D-041)' && echo '(6) Arabic: NEVER .lower()/.upper()/.strip() on Arabic strings' && echo '(7) Primary text bytes NEVER modified after extraction (D-004)' && echo '(8) Never implement spec errors — fix the spec first' && echo '' && echo '--- EASILY FORGOTTEN AFTER COMPACTION ---' && echo '(9) Result preservation: every API call persists output + update COST_LOG.json' && echo '(10) Temperature=0 for ALL consensus LLM calls' && echo '(11) Shared concept changes: grep ALL consumers before modifying enums/statuses' && echo '(12) Tests: every function needs real Arabic fixture test (no transliteration)' && echo '(13) After modifying engines/*/src/ or contracts.py: dispatch code-reviewer agent' && echo '' && echo 'Read the active engines CLAUDE.md + principles.md in memory/ for full context.'

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo '--- git status ---' && git branch --show-current && git status --short | head -10 && echo '--- recent commits ---' && git log --oneline -5 && echo '' && echo '--- NEXT.md (first 15 lines) ---' && head -15 NEXT.md 2>/dev/null
